title: CobbleDollar Shops
description: Makes shops in CobbleTowns and Cobblemon Additions use Cobbledollars as currency
body:
Thank you to [Johnzin](https://modrinth.com/user/Johnzin) for help on this!

This datapack unifies the economy between CobbleTowns and BCA, standardizing Cobbledollars as the official currency across both systems. All shop villagers are replaced with Cobblemerchants from the Cobbledollars mod for a more consistent and immersive shopping experience.

Shop inventories are fully customized with item selections and prices based on the original Pokémon games—bringing a nostalgic and balanced progression system to your Cobblemon world.

Features:
- CobbleTowns and BCA now use Cobbledollars for all transactions.
- Replaces all shop villagers with Cobblemerchants from the Cobbledollars mod.
- Custom shop inventories and pricing modeled after the mainline Pokémon games.

Requirements:
- CobbleTowns
- CobbleDollars
- Cobblemon
- Pokeblocks
- Cobblemon Repel
